component.name: LGL System Loadout
component.summary: Guided setup wizard for Fedora gaming, content creation, and development

description.p: LGL System Loadout gets a fresh Fedora install ready for gaming, content creation, and development - without the terminal. Pick exactly what you want from a curated list, click Install, and you are done.
Nothing is selected by default. Every item shows whether it is already installed before you commit. One password prompt covers the entire installation.

ul.li: Added kernel-modules-extra for controller and input device support
Fixed Flatpak progress output spamming the log
Fixed clipboard buttons on Done page for Wayland
Fixed graphical artifact during Flatpak installs
Improved first launch reliability after install from Discover
Metainfo file renamed to reverse-DNS format to match component ID and desktop file
Desktop file renamed to reverse-DNS format to satisfy AppStream validation
Fixed AppStream metadata component ID so the app appears correctly in Discover
Fixed Panel Colorizer download failing due to spaces in temp directory path
Fixed Panel Colorizer log showing garbled binary text
Fixed KZones download failing due to same space-in-path issue
Fixed kernel warning box overlapping log output on System Update page
Added Secure Boot warning on CachyOS Kernel page
